name: AfCycDesign
description: Modifies the AlphaFold model to design cyclic peptides. Design peptide backbones given a protein pdb file. 36 out of 49 cases predicted with high confidence (pLDDT > 0.85) match the native structure with root mean squared deviation (RMSD) less than 1.5 Å.
capabilities: Modifies the AlphaFold model to design cyclic peptides
Design peptide backbones given a protein pdb file
36 out of 49 cases predicted with high confidence (pLDDT > 0.85) match the native structure with root mean squared deviation (RMSD) less than 1.5 Å

pdbFile.description: Protein structure in PDB format as the target for cyclic peptide design

peptideLength.description: Length of the cyclic peptide to design

numDesigns.description: Number of peptide backbone designs to generate
